resolver: conflict — no compatible set of versions found:
  - dependency clash: a/x requires d/w but the chosen version cannot be reconciled
  - dependency clash: b/y requires d/w but the chosen version cannot be reconciled

derivation:
  Because a/x 1.0.0 requires d/w ^1.0 and (1) your manifest requires d/w ^2.0,
  no solution remains.
  And because your manifest requires a/x ^1.0, no solution remains.
  Because b/y 1.0.0 requires d/w ^1.0 and (1),
  no solution remains.
  And because your manifest requires b/y ^1.0, no solution remains.
  And, because the above derivations hold, version solving failed.
